data.body: Implemented + pushed as Gerrit change 443 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/443). Deliverables: has_issues flipped true on navapbc/rebar; ISSUE_TEMPLATE reworked to Go-style 00-bug/10-feature/20-question forms (bug form has render:shell env + 5 required blocks); config.yml blank_issues_enabled=false + 2 contact_links (Gerrit, SECURITY); SUPPORT.md re-routed to GitHub Issues primary w/ Discussions-off decision; labels needs-triage + waiting-for-info created (bug/enhancement/question already existed). All file ACs grep-verified; lint+config-check green; YAML validated. Awaiting LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 before close.
